_comment: OPTIONAL reviewer-routing policy for fulcra-coord. Copy to ${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-~/.config}/fulcra-coord/review-routing.json and replace the placeholder ids below with YOUR fleet's reviewer agent ids (e.g. claude-code:<host>:<repo>). With NO file present, the reviewer pool is purely capability-driven: every live/idle agent that declared the `review` capability (via `connect --can-review` / `connect --role review`) is a candidate. A seed only adds preferred reviewers ahead of that pool as a tie-break; an empty/absent seed degrades gracefully to pure capability routing. `author_overrides` lets you steer reviews from a given author-id prefix to a different preferred reviewer. Env FULCRA_COORD_REVIEW_SEED (comma-separated) overrides this file's top-level `seed`. Never hard-code these ids in source — they are per-adopter policy and belong here.
